summary.shape_sentence: Bearish trend day with a hard opening liquidation, midday stair-step continuation, 14:00 low, then a late rebound that failed to reclaim the opening damage.

goat.note: Opening selloff from near 26145 toward 25765 was the standout move.

red_circles.behavior: No visible red-circle labels on this frame; bearish pivots were concentrated at the opening rejection and midday continuation.

green_circles.behavior: No visible green-circle labels on this frame; bullish behavior was mainly the post-14:00 countertrend recovery.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange supply-bank icons; resistance appeared respected near the late-morning bounce zone around 25840-25850.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue demand-bank icons; demand emerged near the 14:00 low around 25435 but only produced a rebound, not a full reversal.

time_markers.10am_blue: Active downside expansion near the first liquidation low around 25800.
time_markers.12pm_red: Weak consolidation below the morning bounce, with sellers still controlling structure.
time_markers.2pm_green: Price was pressing into the session low zone near 25435 before the late rebound.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near 25660.75 after a late recovery, still far below the open.

tags.banks_respected: no_visible_banks; resistance respected below late-morning bounce zone
tags.banks_broken: no_visible_banks; early demand failed during opening liquidation

takeaway: Bearish opening-drive trend day with the GOAT move immediately after the bell, followed by controlled downside continuation into a 14:00 flush and a late countertrend rebound.
